_meta.description: Adversarial brand-detection cases. 'expected' is GROUND TRUTH (is the answer actually about this business), so the matcher's real false positives/negatives are measured honestly — including documented limitations (ambiguous single-word brands -> FP; misspellings/non-latin -> FN).
